description: Single-page personal portfolio website — dark mode, bold typography, GSAP animations, responsive. Sections: Hero, About, Experience/Timeline, Projects, Resume, Contact. Stack: Next.js + Tailwind v4 + GSAP.

userStories.title: Set up GSAP and global design tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I need GSAP installed and a dark theme baseline with CSS custom properties so all subsequent stories can build on a consistent foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: Install gsap and @gsap/react via npm
globals.css defines CSS custom properties: --color-bg: #1A1A1A, --color-text: #F4F4F4, --color-accent: #FF4400, --color-light: #D1E0E8, --color-muted: #757575
globals.css applies to html: background-color: var(--color-bg), color: var(--color-text)
globals.css registers Tailwind utilities for each token (e.g. bg-[#FF4400] or @theme inline block with CSS variables) so colors are usable in classNames
globals.css sets html { scroll-behavior: smooth; overflow-x: hidden; }
layout.tsx sets lang='en', applies base font (Inter or DM Sans via next/font), and sets className with bg-[#1A1A1A] text-[#F4F4F4]
app/page.tsx is emptied to a minimal shell (single root div) ready for section components
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-02-27: gsap@3.14.2 and @gsap/react@2.1.2 installed. globals.css updated with CSS custom properties and Tailwind theme tokens. layout.tsx uses DM Sans via next/font, lang='en', bg-[#1A1A1A] text-[#F4F4F4]. page.tsx emptied to minimal shell. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Sticky navigation bar
userStories.description: As a visitor scrolling the page, I want a sticky nav so I can jump to any section at any time.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/Nav.tsx as a 'use client' component
Fixed top nav with site name/initials on the left and links on the right: About, Experience, Projects, Resume, Contact
Nav links use href='#about', '#experience', '#projects', '#resume', '#contact' for in-page scroll
On scroll past 80px, nav gains background: bg-[#1A1A1A]/90 backdrop-blur-sm transition
Active section link is highlighted with text-[#FF4400] (tracked via IntersectionObserver)
Mobile: hamburger button (3 lines icon) visible below md breakpoint; clicking it toggles a full-width dropdown menu with all nav links
Dropdown closes when a nav link is clicked
Nav is imported and rendered in app/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-02-27: Created components/Nav.tsx as 'use client'. Fixed top nav with site initials 'ST' on left and About/Experience/Projects/Resume/Contact links on right. Scroll past 80px adds bg-[#1A1A1A]/90 backdrop-blur-sm. Active section tracked via IntersectionObserver with text-[#FF4400] highlight. Mobile hamburger (3 lines) toggles full-width dropdown; dropdown closes on link click. Nav imported and rendered in app/page.tsx. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: Hero section
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to immediately understand who this person is and feel impressed by the first screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/Hero.tsx as a 'use client' component
Full-viewport section (min-h-screen) with id='hero'
Large headline: name placeholder 'Simone Traversi' at text-5xl (mobile) md:text-7xl lg:text-9xl font-bold
Role/tagline line below headline at text-xl md:text-2xl text-[#757575], placeholder: 'Full-Stack Developer & Creative Engineer'
Short positioning statement (2 lines, placeholder text) at text-base md:text-lg text-[#D1E0E8]
Two CTA buttons: 'View Work' (href='#projects') and 'Get in Touch' (href='#contact'); primary button uses bg-[#FF4400] text-[#F4F4F4], secondary uses border border-[#F4F4F4]
Buttons stack vertically (flex-col) on mobile, side by side (flex-row gap-4) on md+
GSAP entrance animation on mount: headline, tagline, description, and buttons stagger in from y:60 opacity:0 using useGSAP hook
gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger) called once in this file
Hero is imported and rendered in app/page.tsx below Nav
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-02-27: Created components/Hero.tsx as 'use client'. Full-viewport section (min-h-screen) with id='hero'. Headline 'Simone Traversi' at text-5xl/md:text-7xl/lg:text-9xl font-bold. Tagline at text-xl/md:text-2xl text-[#757575]. Positioning statement at text-base/md:text-lg text-[#D1E0E8]. CTA buttons 'View Work' (bg-[#FF4400]) and 'Get in Touch' (border border-[#F4F4F4]); flex-col on mobile, flex-row gap-4 on md+. GSAP entrance animation via useGSAP: headline, tagline, description, buttons stagger from y:60 opacity:0. gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger) called. Hero imported and rendered in app/page.tsx. Typecheck passes.

userStories.title: About section
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to learn about who this person is, their background, and what they stand for.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/About.tsx as a 'use client' component
Section with id='about', py-24 md:py-32 padding
Section heading 'About' at text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold with a short orange underline accent (border-b-2 border-[#FF4400] inline-block)
Two-column layout on md+: left = square image placeholder (aspect-square bg-[#D1E0E8]/20 w-full), right = text block
Single column on mobile: image on top, text below
Text block: bio paragraph placeholder (2–3 sentences), followed by 4 trait/value bullet points (e.g. '→ Problem solver', '→ Clean code advocate')
Bullet points use text-[#FF4400] for the arrow/symbol
GSAP ScrollTrigger: section container fades and slides up (y:40, opacity:0 → y:0, opacity:1) when it enters the viewport
About is imported and rendered in app/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Experience / Timeline section
userStories.description: As a recruiter or client, I want to see a clear career timeline to assess seniority and trajectory.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/Experience.tsx as a 'use client' component
Section with id='experience', py-24 md:py-32 padding
Section heading 'Experience' at text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold
Vertical timeline with a continuous left-edge line (2px bg-[#757575])

At least 3 placeholder timeline entries; each entry has: colored dot node (bg-[#FF4400] w-3 h-3 rounded-full on the line), company name (text-[#F4F4F4] font-semibold), role title (text-[#D1E0E8]), date range (text-[#757575] text-sm), 2 bullet points of responsibilities (text-[#D1E0E8] text-sm)
On mobile: entries are full-width, line runs down the left edge
On desktop: entries are indented with comfortable left padding
GSAP ScrollTrigger: each entry animates in sequentially with stagger (x:-30, opacity:0 → x:0, opacity:1) as user scrolls down
Experience is imported and rendered in app/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Projects section
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to browse selected projects and understand what was built, what stack was used, and where to see it.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/Projects.tsx as a 'use client' component
Section with id='projects', py-24 md:py-32 padding
Section heading 'Projects' at text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold
Responsive grid: 1 column (mobile) → 2 columns (md) → 3 columns (lg)
At least 3 placeholder project cards

Each card: 16:9 image placeholder (bg-[#D1E0E8]/20), project title (text-[#F4F4F4] font-semibold text-xl), short description (2 lines, text-[#757575] text-sm), tech tag pills (bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#757575] text-[#D1E0E8] text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded), and a 'View →' link in text-[#FF4400]
Card hover: border changes to border-[#FF4400] (CSS transition, no GSAP needed)
GSAP ScrollTrigger: cards stagger in (y:40, opacity:0 with stagger:0.1) when section enters viewport
Projects is imported and rendered in app/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Resume section
userStories.description: As a recruiter, I want to view or download a resume directly from the page without navigating away.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/Resume.tsx as a client or server component (no animations required beyond static layout)
Create public/resume.pdf as a placeholder empty file
Section with id='resume', py-24 md:py-32 padding
Section heading 'Resume' at text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold
Prominent 'Download PDF' button (bg-[#FF4400] text-[#F4F4F4] px-8 py-4) linking to /resume.pdf with download attribute
Skills block below button: 3 skill groups (e.g. 'Languages', 'Frameworks', 'Tools') each with 4–5 placeholder skill tags (same pill style as project tech tags)
Skill groups displayed in 1 column (mobile) → 3 columns (md+)
Education block: one placeholder entry with institution, degree, and year in text-[#757575]
Resume is imported and rendered in app/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Contact section
userStories.description: As a potential client or employer, I want an easy way to reach out directly from the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/Contact.tsx as a 'use client' component
Section with id='contact', py-24 md:py-32 padding
Large heading placeholder: 'Let's work together.' at text-4xl md:text-6xl font-bold
Contact form with controlled inputs: Name (text), Email (email), Message (textarea min 4 rows)
All inputs styled: bg-transparent border-b border-[#757575] text-[#F4F4F4] focus:border-[#FF4400] outline-none w-full py-3
Submit button: bg-[#FF4400] text-[#F4F4F4] px-8 py-4 font-semibold
On submit (preventDefault): button text changes to 'Message sent!' and form inputs are cleared; no real API call
Social links row below the form: GitHub, LinkedIn, X/Twitter icons (SVG or text links) with href='#' placeholder; links styled text-[#757575] hover:text-[#FF4400]
Form is full-width on mobile, max-w-xl centered on desktop
GSAP ScrollTrigger: heading animates in from y:40 opacity:0 on scroll
Contact is imported and rendered in app/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Footer
userStories.description: As a visitor who has reached the bottom, I want to see a minimal footer with credits and a back-to-top link.
acceptanceCriteria: Create components/Footer.tsx as a server or client component
Footer with border-t border-[#757575] py-8 px-6
Left side: copyright text '© 2025 Simone Traversi' in text-[#757575] text-sm
Right side: 'Back to top ↑' link with href='#hero' in text-[#757575] hover:text-[#FF4400] text-sm
Two items flex row on md+; stacked on mobile
Footer is imported and rendered at the bottom of app/page.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
